content.situation: 朋友邀请你周末一起吃饭，你想表达感谢并婉拒，同时提出下次再约
content.speakerText: We're having a little get-together this Saturday—would you like to join?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们周六有个小聚会，你想来吗？
content.responseTemplate: Thanks for inviting me! I ___ this weekend, but let's plan something next time?
content.hint: 用‘感谢+拒绝+改期’结构，拒绝时用中性表达避免生硬
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌拒绝的三明治结构

content.situation: 朋友说你最近总不出门，想邀请你周末聚会，你想表达理解并说明自己需要休息
content.speakerText: You've been MIA lately—come out with us this weekend, it'll be great!
content.speakerTextCn: 你最近都不见人影了，这周末和我们出来吧，肯定很棒！
content.responseTemplate: I know I've been quiet lately—I'm just ___ this weekend, but I really appreciate you thinking of me.
content.hint: 用积极表达替代负面词汇，传达休息需求而非排斥社交

content.situation: 朋友热情邀请你周末聚餐，你希望表达遗憾但不想让对方失望
content.speakerText: It won't be the same without you—please say yes!
content.speakerTextCn: 没有你就不完整了，求你答应吧！
content.responseTemplate: I really wish I could—this weekend is ___ for me, but I'm already looking forward to next time!
content.hint: 强调‘不是不想’而是‘条件不允许’，并立即转向积极期待
content.knowledgePoint: 减轻拒绝感的正向收尾技巧
